body:
Need visual review of generated #48 ambient life assets. All are 32x32 top-down pixel art for an industrial game setting.

1) Rock pile — 64 candidates in review at object a0d82a51-b372-4962-91e1-78552e605551. Use webfetch to view the frame URLs: https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/a0d82a51-b372-4962-91e1-78552e605551/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png

Reply with which frame indices (0-63) are worth keeping. The other two assets (debris ec6d8d0a, bushes 0eed43e8) are still processing.
